A True Story *

🐄 Cow in the Cloud

A freak tornado swept Berta into the sky. She landed on a magic cloud and — to her complete indifference — discovered she could float. She did not panic. She simply continued chewing.

Farmer Jan is waving. Planes are swerving. Scientists are baffled. Berta is fine.

Hold / tap to rise · dodge birds & eagles · catch rain clouds to refill · MOO, FART & BURP for power
